revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects U]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects U]]</noinclude>"

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Under discussion inline]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects U]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects U
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
